search.query: `windowsindex` "Windows Update Client successfully" | rex field=_raw "(?<numpatch>\d+)\supdates" | stats first(numpatch) AS nm,max(_time) AS Time by host | search host="$Host_mis$" | where nm > 0 | table Time host nm | rename host AS Server nm AS "Number of missing patches" | sort - Time | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

`windowsindex` action=Success "Content Install" "Installation Successful" host="$Host_last$" | rex field=_raw "Content Install\s+(?<message>.*)" | stats first(_time) AS Time, first(message) AS message BY host | table Time host message | sort - Time | rename host AS Server message AS "Last Message" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)
